falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above 5,200 with a volume surge exceeding 20% of the 20-day average
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff top formation would invalidate the HOLD signal by confirming a strong bullish breakout contrary to the UNKNOWN verdict

falsification_conditions.condition: The 200-day moving average crosses below the 50-day moving average on heavy volume (>1.5x average)
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A confirmed bearish death cross would directly contradict the pattern's similarity to the 2024 bottom and invalidate the current HOLD signal

falsification_conditions.condition: The CBOE VIX drops below 15 and stays there for 7 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Extremely low volatility would falsify the UNKNOWN verdict by indicating a clear market regime shift contrary to the blowoff score's implications

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
